items.title: ED freezes ₹18.36 crore and 242 bank accounts Exalogic-CMRL payoff case
items.summary: Simultaneous raids were conducted across 10 locations in Kerala and Bengaluru on Wednesday. Raids yielded documents pertaining to investments and fixed deposits in banks, say ED...

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Political Pressure Will Not Sway Him in Talks
items.summary: President Trump said U.S. politics would not affect his war strategy, adding, “I don’t care about the midterms.” He also insisted that Iran would not control the Strait of Hormuz.
